title: SuppressGL
body:
## Info
Simple mod that removes all debug messages that are displayed.
![Example debug logging](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d71d6c407bfb347061936046ff720334366f5b9.png)

## Versions
To utilize the mod on mostly any modern minecraft version, all you really need to do is to clone the repository and change gradle.properties, and maybe, change gradle wrapper version and fabric loom to correct versions aswell. (May not work for versions below 1.13)

## Warning
This includes warning and errors, meaning that you should probably only use this if you know what you're doing. Something could be going wrong, and you won't even notice.
